## What & why

Briefly: what this changes and the problem it solves. Link the issue it addresses.

Closes #

## How it was verified

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] `sh conformance/verify.sh --require` green
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior or interfaces changed)

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything the reviewer should focus on, trade-offs considered, or follow-ups deferred.
